title: _decimal: concurrent hash() of a shared Decimal races on the cached hash field (dec_hash)
description: `_decimal.c` dec_hash memoizes the hash in self->hash (-1 sentinel) with a plain read/write; concurrent hash() of a shared Decimal is a data race on an operation callers treat as read-only.
severity: low (value-benign, crash-free; data race on read-only-looking hash())
suggested_fix: relaxed atomics on self->hash (FT_ATOMIC load/store), matching the cached-hash pattern used for other immutable types
notes: Same lazy-hash-cache idiom (hash==-1 sentinel) as other C types; fix is to make the cache field atomic. Audit _decimal for other memoized plain fields.

related_issues.note: decimal mpd_context_t.status race (PR #150598) — DIFFERENT field; the cached-hash race is distinct

assessment: real, new (distinct from the decimal context.status race)
